info.name: UAMD Portal API
info.description: REST API për Portalin e Universitetit Aleksander Moisiu Durrës (UAMD). Të gjitha endpoint-et janë të prefixuara me /api/v1/.

request.description:
Returns a Sanctum token for pedagog and admin users.
Students must use the Google OAuth flow instead.

response.body: {"data": null, "message": "Student\u00ebt hyjn\u00eb vet\u00ebm me Google OAuth.", "status": 403}
response.name: Student tried email login

request.description:
Redirects the browser to Google's consent screen.
Open this URL directly in the browser; **do not** call it via fetch/axios.
Accepts university emails: `@uamd.edu.al` (staff) and `@students.uamd.edu.al` (students).

response.body: Redirecting to https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/auth?client_id=&redirect_uri=http%3A%2F%2F127.0.0.1%3A8000%2Fapi%2Fv1%2Fauth%2Fgoogle%2Fcallback&scope=openid+profile+email&response_type=code.

request.description:
Handles Google's redirect back. Looks up the email in the system to determine
the user's role (student, pedagog, or admin). Unknown emails are rejected.
On success, redirects to the SPA with a token in the URL.

response.body: Redirecting to http://localhost:5173/login?error=oauth_failed.

request.description: Returns the currently authenticated user's profile.
Revokes the current Sanctum token.

Updates the password for the authenticated user.
Only available for users who have a password (pedagog / admin).

response.body: {"data": null, "message": "T\u00eb dh\u00ebnat nuk jan\u00eb t\u00eb sakta.", "status": 422}
response.name: Wrong current password

response.body: {"data": {"id": 1, "name": "Algoritmika e Avancuar", "code": "INF101", "departmentId": 4}, "message": "Lënda u përditësua me sukses.", "status": 200}

request.description: Returns all courses. Pass `department_id` to filter by department.
Returns a single course by its ID.
Returns all departments. Pass `faculty_id` to filter by faculty.
Returns a single department by its ID.

response.body: {"data": {"id": 4, "name": "Departamenti i Informatik\u00ebs", "facultyId": 2}, "message": "Departamenti u mor me sukses.", "status": 200}
{"data": {"id": 10, "name": "Departamenti i Ri", "facultyId": 2}, "message": "Departamenti u krijua me sukses.", "status": 201}
{"data": {"id": 4, "name": "Emër i ri", "facultyId": 2}, "message": "Departamenti u përditësua me sukses.", "status": 200}

request.description: Returns all 6 UAMD faculties ordered by ID.
Returns a single faculty by its ID.

response.body: {"data": {"id": 1, "name": "Fakulteti i Shkencave t\u00eb Biznesit"}, "message": "Fakulteti u mor me sukses.", "status": 200}
{"data": {"id": 7, "name": "Fakulteti i Ri"}, "message": "Fakulteti u krijua me sukses.", "status": 201}
{"data": {"id": 1, "name": "Emër i ri"}, "message": "Fakulteti u përditësua me sukses.", "status": 200}

request.description: Returns all notifications for the authenticated user, ordered newest first.
Returns the count of unread notifications for the authenticated user.
Marks a single notification as read. Only the owning user can mark their own notifications.

response.body: {"data": {"id": 1, "title": "Njoftim i ri", "body": "Teksti i njoftimit.", "type": "info", "isRead": true, "readAt": "2026-04-17T10:05:00.000000Z", "createdAt": "2026-04-17T10:00:00.000000Z"}, "message": "Njoftimi u sh\u00ebnua si i lexuar.", "status": 200}

request.description: Marks all unread notifications of the authenticated user as read.

response.body: {"data": null, "message": "T\u00eb gjitha njoftimet u sh\u00ebnuan si t\u00eb lexuara.", "status": 200}

request.description:
Sends a notification to a specific user or to all users of a given role.
If `recipient_user_id` is provided, only that user receives it.
Otherwise, every user matching `recipient_role` (or all users if omitted) receives it.

response.body: {"data": null, "message": "Njoftimet u d\u00ebrguan me sukses tek 120 p\u00ebrdorues.", "status": 200}

request.description: Returns all pedagogues. Pass `department_id` to filter by department.
Returns a single pedagogue by their ID.

Returns the list of class sections (teaching slots) assigned to the authenticated pedagog,
ordered by day and start time. Each entry includes the course, classroom, and schedule info.

response.body: {"data": null, "message": "Nuk u gjet profili i pedagogut.", "status": 404}
{"data": {"id": 10, "name": "Programi i Ri", "level": "Bachelor", "credits": 180, "departmentId": 4}, "message": "Programi i studimit u krijua me sukses.", "status": 201}
{"data": {"id": 1, "name": "Emër i ri", "level": "Master", "credits": 120, "departmentId": 4}, "message": "Programi i studimit u përditësua me sukses.", "status": 200}
{"data": null, "message": "Programi i studimit u fshi me sukses.", "status": 200}

request.description: Returns all study programs. Pass `department_id` to filter by department.
Returns a single study program by its ID.

response.body: {"data": {"id": 1, "name": "Informatik\u00eb", "level": "Bachelor", "credits": 180, "departmentId": 4}, "message": "Programi i studimit u mor me sukses.", "status": 200}

request.description: Returns all grades for the authenticated student, sorted by date desc.
Returns all invoices for the authenticated student, sorted by issue date desc.

Returns grades for all students in the given section. The authenticated
pedagog must teach that section — otherwise 403 is returned.

response.body: {"data": null, "message": "Nuk keni leje p\u00ebr k\u00ebt\u00eb seksion.", "status": 403}

query.description: optional Filter by status: Aktiv, Pezulluar, I diplomuar, Ç'regjistruar.
optional Field to sort by (STU_MB, STU_EM, STU_ID).

request.description: Returns paginated students with optional status filter and sorting.
Returns a single student by ID.

Creates a STUDENT row and a users (auth) row in a single transaction.
Students authenticate via Google OAuth — no password is set.

Updates profile fields only. Email is intentionally excluded —
it is the link to the users (auth) row and changing it would break login.

Sets STU_STATUS to "Ç'regjistruar". Does not hard-delete because the
student may have linked grades, invoices, or registrations (FK constraints).
